vocab.meaning: sự minh mẫn nhất về nhận thức
vocab.example: I tend to tackle my most challenging assignments before midday because that is when I am at my cognitive sharpest.

vocab.meaning: khoảng thời gian trước khi bình minh
vocab.example: I find the pre-dawn hours exceptionally peaceful, allowing me to engage in deep work without any external distractions.
My natural inclination is towards afternoon study sessions, as it takes a few hours for my brain to fully wake up.
I avoid studying right after lunch to bypass the inevitable sluggishness that sets in during the early afternoon.
The period between 10 AM and 1 PM is my optimum window for retaining complex theoretical information.

vocab.meaning: đỉnh điểm của sự tỉnh táo
vocab.example: Scientific research suggests that for many, alertness peaks in the late morning, making it an ideal time for academic pursuits.

vocab.meaning: trạng thái mơ hồ, không tập trung được
vocab.example: If I don't get enough sleep, I suffer from significant brain fog in the morning, so I push my revision to the afternoon.

vocab.meaning: sự chú ý tuyệt đối, toàn tâm toàn ý
vocab.example: The afternoon is often when I can give my undivided attention to my thesis, as the morning rush has finally subsided.

vocab.meaning: tâm trí đã được nghỉ ngơi đầy đủ
vocab.example: Approaching a new topic with a well-rested mind in the morning ensures that I don't feel overwhelmed by the details.

vocab.meaning: hiệu suất giảm dần (dù nỗ lực không đổi)
vocab.example: By late afternoon, I often hit a point of diminishing returns where I'm reading the same paragraph repeatedly without understanding it.
